Turn 102 ‚ÄĒ attachment-only idempotence of the terminal state The required three attachments for this turn are present: mega_prompt.md, problem_statement.md, and turns_history__q2_candidate_iso.md. I did not substitute any File Library material.The attached prompt/problem still ask the same question: whether the two quotients őďS,őďH are isomorphic over G, equivalently whether there is a continuous isomorphism commuting with the canonical projections.The attached history‚Äôs terminal state remains unchanged: the theorem coordinate isőďS‚ČÖGőďH,supported by the stronger sweep statement that there is a continuous over-G automorphism ő¶:F‚ÜíF,ő¶(rS‚ąí1)=rH,which descends to the desired quotient isomorphism because rS and rS‚ąí1 have the same closed normal closure.No new structural computation should be opened. The history explicitly says not to reopen the Magnus tower, coefficient tower, degree 16, the A2 -layer, the t-layer, or any Certificate D subcase under history-only input. The proof chain is frozen asH1 -Nielsen¬†equivalence+¬†residual¬†restricted-Lie¬†induction+¬†normalized¬†Koszul‚ÄďWitt¬†coefficient¬†induction+D.1‚ÄďD.4+¬†finite¬†filtered¬†Nielsen¬†compactness‚áíőďS‚ČÖGőďH.The compactness descent remains the final global mechanism: finite filtered Nielsen/cocycle data give compatible finite over-G automorphisms; their inverse limit gives ő¶:F‚ÜíF with ő¶(rS‚ąí1)=rH, and hence őďS‚ČÖGőďH.The measured-certificate coordinate also remains unchanged. This turn attaches only the prompt, problem statement, and history ledger; it does not attach object-level measured nonlinear D.1‚ÄďD.4 artifacts such as scripts, matrices, pivots, or measured-output logs. Therefore the strict Certificate D gate is still

NO_MEASURED_INPUT,not PASS, not FAIL, and not REJECTED_AS_LEDGER_DERIVED. The history‚Äôs own reported verifier outputs remain ledger statements, not newly attached measured artifacts.

So Turn 102 is idempotent:(THEOREM_STATE,MEASURED_CERTIFICATE_D_STATE)=(őďS‚ČÖGőďH,¬†NO_MEASURED_INPUT).

ESTABLISHED: History-only, prompt-only, and problem-only input leaves the terminal two-coordinate state unchanged. The theorem coordinate remains őďS‚ČÖGőďH, via an over-G automorphism ő¶:F‚ÜíF satisfying ő¶(rS‚ąí1)=rH. The measured Certificate D coordinate remains NO_MEASURED_INPUT.

GAP: No structural mathematical gap is reopened. The only remaining gap is external reproducibility: no genuine object-level measured nonlinear D.1‚ÄďD.4 artifacts are attached in this turn.

NEXT: Keep the obstruction sweep closed. The only valid next move is to attach genuine measured D.1‚ÄďD.4 scripts, matrices, pivots, or measured-output logs not derived from the history, then run the strict gate as PASS or FAIL.[TURN102-ATTACHMENT-ONLY-IDEMPOTENT-GATE]
